subcodes.title: Ziyarat-i-‘Ashura
subcodes.first_line: If thou didst recline upon that crimson throne and drink of the wine from the cup of destiny... Peace be upon God, the Single, the One, the Alone, the Self-Subsisting, the Most Great, the All-Sufficient, and peace be upon the First to be mentioned in the realm of eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرقیب القریب. فاذا استقرت علی ذالک السریر الاحمر و اشربت ماء الخمر فی کأس القدر … سلام الله الفرد الاحد الواحد الصمد المتکبر المعتمد و سلام اول ذکره فی عالم الابد
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
